title: Entity Valuation Agent — Web UI
description: Dashboard for your Bloomberg-connected valuation agent. Upload comparables, trigger analysis, view formatted output. Connects to the Python backend you're already building.

title: Tax Research MCP Server
description: FastMCP server exposing IRC section lookup, OECD guideline search, PLR/case law retrieval, and GILTI/Subpart F quick calcs. Plugs directly into your Claude Code workflows.

title: TP Sanitizer — Drag & Drop UI
description: Web front-end for your transfer pricing doc sanitization tool. Drag in a PDF/DOCX, preview redactions, download sanitized version. Keeps everything local — no external API calls.

title: GILTI / Subpart F Calculator
description: Multi-CFC GILTI and Subpart F income calculator with §951A high-tax exclusion, QBAI/NTEI inputs, §861 expense allocation, and tested income/loss netting across EMEA entities.

title: Family Command Center MCP
description: MCP server for kid routines, meal planning, and family schedule coordination. Daily briefings auto-include kid dropoff/pickup, Melissa's travel days, and dinner planning.

title: FitTrack MCP Server
description: MCP server for workout logging, PT exercise tracking, and hydration. Connects FitTrack PWA data to Claude so I can proactively suggest workouts filtered through your injury profile.

title: Italy Trip Planner PWA
description: Day-by-day itinerary app for Aug 12–26. Packing list, restaurant reservations, transfer times, activity slots. Offline-capable so it works without data in Italy.

title: Delta Award Alert Bot
description: Monitors AwardFares for low-mile availability on your watchlist routes (MSP→CUN, MSP→SJD, MSP→MBJ). Sends Telegram alert the moment a deal drops — especially around school breaks.

title: Interest Expense Allocation Dashboard
description: §861 interest expense allocation calculator with asset basis inputs, average asset method vs. modified gross income method toggle, and CFC group allocation output.

title: Arsenal Season Tracker — Deep Stats
description: Extends the Intelligence Dashboard with xG charts, progressive passes, pressure maps, and player heatmaps via FBref/Understat scraping. Season-long trend lines.

title: 3am Brain Dump — Insomnia Capture App
description: Minimal, instant-open PWA for your 3-5am racing mind. One tap to start voice or typed capture. Auto-tags entries (work idea / personal / urgent / random). Syncs to daily notes. Built for one-handed use in the dark — no friction, no menus. Good ideas shouldn't die at 3am.

title: Elle's Reading Stars — Gamified Tracker
description: Visual reading progress tracker for Elle. Shows Heart Words mastered as a constellation, earns a Lego brick for each session (she hyperfocuses on Legos — use this). Reads-aloud confirmation, parent-side logging. ADHD-inattentive optimized: big rewards, short sessions, no failure states.

title: Weekly Meal Planner
description: You do all the cooking and grocery shopping. Plan the week in 5 minutes: kids eat at 5:30 (simple), adults at 8:30 (real food). Knows Melissa's travel days. Generates a grouped grocery list by store section. Rotates favorites so you're not reinventing dinner every Sunday.

title: Radiculopathy Symptom Journal
description: Daily log for your C5-C6/C6-C7 nerve symptoms: arm numbness, tricep pain, what triggered it, what helped. Shows weekly trend. Generates a 1-page summary you can hand a doctor or PT — concrete data beats 'my arm hurts sometimes.' Also flags correlation with specific exercises.

title: International Tax Law Change Monitor
description: Daily scan of IRS (irs.gov/newsroom), Treasury, OECD BEPS portal, and BNA/Bloomberg Tax headlines for anything touching GILTI, Subpart F, Pillar Two, and transfer pricing. More focused than the Daily Briefing. Weekly digest + instant Telegram alert when something Cargill-relevant drops.

title: Abacus AI Training Hub
description: Interactive training PWA for getting up to speed on Abacus AI — both ChatLLM (multi-model interface) and DeepAgent (autonomous agent). Module-based: what it is, model selection guide, RAG chatbots, DeepAgent workflows, data privacy rules, and Cargill-specific tax use cases. Includes quizzes, practical exercises, and step-by-step guides. Built for onboarding your tax org team.

title: PT Daily Protocol — Spine & Shoulder
description: Daily exercise tracker built specifically for your injury stack: C5-C6/C6-C7 disc protocol, scapular stabilization (serratus anterior + lower trap), bilateral AC joint, right bicep tendon. Each session logs pain/numbness level (0-10) in right arm/tricep, which exercises completed, and how it felt. Weekly trend charts. Tracks radiculopathy flare patterns vs. exercise load. Built around your active PT protocol.

title: Family Meal Planner
description: Weekly meal planning built around your household: two-track (kids 5:30pm / adults 8:30pm), grocery list that auto-builds from the plan, recipe notes, and a pantry staples tracker. Kyle does all the cooking and shopping — this replaces the mental overhead of figuring out what to make. Includes a 'quick meals' bank for solo-parenting nights when Melissa travels.

title: Delta GUC & Upgrade Tracker
description: Track Melissa's Global Upgrade Certificates and companion certificates — which are used, which expire when, which flights are eligible, and when the upgrade window opens (domestic 24h, international varies). Alerts when a flight enters the upgrade window. Pulls from your confirmed itineraries. One-stop answer to 'do we have GUCs left and can we use one on this flight?'

title: Sleep Pattern Journal
description: Lightweight nightly log: time in bed, approximate time asleep, wake time (especially the 3-5am window), mind-racing severity (0-10), Trazodone dose time, and overall quality rating. Weekly trend charts showing patterns — does mind-racing correlate with late Adderall doses? Does wakeup time correlate with alcohol or late meals? Designed to generate useful data for the eventual doctor conversation about meds.

title: Transfer Bonus Alert Bot
description: Monitors Amex MR and Chase UR transfer partner bonus deals — specifically Flying Blue (AMS→MSP needs ~22,500mi; a 25-30% transfer bonus makes it ~17-18K Amex points). Checks ThriftyTraveler, VFTW, and Doctor of Credit for bonus transfer announcements. Telegram alert the moment a bonus drops. Also watches for Air France promos and Avianca promo sales. Most critical: Flying Blue bonus before the May 28 deadline.

title: Italy Packing PWA
description: Smart packing list for 4 people, 15 nights, carry-on only, 4 climate zones (Amalfi heat → Tuscany/Venice evenings → Rome). Organized by person (Kyle, Melissa, Elle, Luka) and by city segment (Sorrento, Tuscany, Venice, Rome). Check-off interface. Notes on LuggAgent bag forwarding days. Includes: what to pack in the day-trip bag vs checked LuggAgent bag. Laundry day suggestions mid-trip (Tuscany).

title: Luka Sports Milestone Tracker
description: Track Luka's athletic development across basketball, soccer, and football — age-appropriate skill milestones for a 5-year-old, session logs, and progression badges. Gamified like the learning app (XP, badges, streaks). Includes suggested drills for each sport by skill level. Designed for quick phone logging during or after practice. Pairs well with the Learning Companion.

title: Annual Card Benefits Dashboard
description: Single-page tracker for ALL your card annual credits — Amex Platinum ($200 airline, $200 hotel, $200 Uber, $240 digital, $155 Walmart+, FHR $300/half), CSR (Exclusive Tables $150/half, StubHub $150/half, Lyft $10/mo, DoorDash $25/mo), Delta Reserve (companion cert status). Shows used vs. remaining with countdown to reset dates. No more mental math on 'how much airline credit do I have left?'

title: Arsenal Match Day Companion
description: Mobile-first match day app: countdown to kickoff, confirmed lineup card (from ESPN/FotMob), live match events feed (goals, cards, subs), post-match player ratings and xG summary, and next fixture. Pulls from the Arsenal Dashboard APIs but designed for phone use on matchday — thumb-friendly, fast. One button to load live match. Notification at lineup announcement (1hr before kickoff).
